$comment: TEMPLATE city dataset. Copy this to cities/<yourcity>.json, replace the spots, and reference it from cities/index.json with source {type:'json', url:'cities/<yourcity>.json'}. Either a bare array of spots OR this {meta,spots} wrapper works. Only `releaseSchedule` + `releaseTime` (+ `releaseDay` for weekly/monthly) drive the countdown — get those right and the timer just works.

spots.name: Example Bistro
spots._HOW_COUNTDOWN_WORKS: releaseSchedule is one of: 'daily' | 'weekly' | 'calendar-month' | 'monthly' | 'none'. releaseTime is parsed like '10:00 AM ET', '12:00 AM (Midnight) ET'. For 'weekly' the day comes from releaseDay (e.g. 'Saturday midnight'). For 'calendar-month'/'monthly' the drop is the 1st of the month at releaseTime. All times are interpreted as America/New_York unless you localize the engine.
tips: Be logged in at 9:59 AM and refresh at exactly 10:00:00.
Cancellations surface around 2 PM the day before.
